violations.text: Handwashing sinks are lacking handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
(Various beverages ) were observed stored on the floor in the (throughout establishment ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
